project_context.description: Netflix-style AI movie creation and streaming platform with integrated AI assistant, multi-file media decoder, and creator studio.
project_context.archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with dark sci-fi cinematic vibes

rules: No pure #000000. Use tinted deep violet-black (#0a050f) for the void.
Primary CTA gets crimson (#dc143c) with hover to a lighter hue.
Use #5a0b8a (violet) for subtle glowing borders or AI assistant chat areas to distinguish them from movie content.
Avoid Inter. Use Playfair Display for big cinematic movie titles. Use Outfit for clean UI dashboards.
Never center-align large dense text. Center only for hero headlines if it improves symmetry.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with tension via bento grids.

marketing_hub_mode.grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8
marketing_hub_mode.usage: For the main 'Netflix-styled' discovery hub, For You, and Genres.

creator_studio_mode.grid: Control Room Grid Mode B - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4
creator_studio_mode.usage: For the movie creator studio, property pickers, and multi-file decoder. Every pixel utilized.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm z-50 sticky top-0
surfaces_and_micro_themes.movie_cards: Flat background with 1px subtle border (border-border/40). On hover: -translate-y-1, subtle crimson glow drop-shadow.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.ai_chat_center: Tracing Beam (Aceternity Look) - Use a shimmering violet/crimson border to highlight the AI assistant. High tech contrast.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay for hero banners: bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent. Never blanket max opacity.

rules: All interactive elements MUST have a hover state changing BOTH color and transform.
Hover text must not become invisible. Use hover:text-white explicitly.
Lists of movies (trending, best rated) must have staggered entrance animations.

components_strategy.shadcn_usage: Use Shadcn components for forms, inputs, tabs, and select dropdowns, but strip Vercal-look and apply cinematic dark theme styles.
components_strategy.html_usage: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for movie bento grids, hero sections, and custom layouts.
components_strategy.tabs: Override fixed heights like h-9 on Shadcn TabsList to h-auto.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast standards. Dark backgrounds need bright text.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='movie-play-button', data-testid='ai-chat-input').

hero_posters.description: Ultra high definition cinematic movie poster, dark sleek deep space sci-fi theme.
Abstract surreal cinematic movie poster for Strange AI.

backgrounds.description: High end cinematic title card background, dark sleek obsidian texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON and strictly follow the Dark Cinematic Jewel & Luxury archetype.
Implement the Netflix-style hub using Mode A Bento Grids.
Implement the creator studio with dense Control Room Grid (Mode B).
The central AI agent chat must use Aceternity style glowing borders to pop against the dark UI.
For ALL .js component files, include the defined data-testid attributes.
Consume media URLs precisely as categorized for banners, scene thumbnails, and actor profiles.
